sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 메리어트 인터내셔널은 2025년 전 세계 RevPAR 성장과 40억 달러 규모의 주주 환원을 달성하며 견조한 실적을 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 전 세계 RevPAR은 2% 성장했으며, 40억 달러를 배당 및 자사주 매입을 통해 주주에게 환원했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 국제 시장의 RevPAR은 4분기 6.1% 성장하며 성장을 견인했으나, 미국 및 캐나다 지역은 0.1% 소폭 감소했습니다.
자산 경량화(asset-light) 비즈니스 모델을 통해 지속적인 현금 흐름을 창출하며 개발 활동의 모멘텀을 유지하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2026년 연간 전망으로 RevPAR 1.5~2.5% 성장, 조정 EBITDA 8~10% 성장, 43억 달러 이상의 자본 투입을 예상합니다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 가이던스에서 제시한 조정 EBITDA 8~10% 성장 목표 달성 여부와 미국 시장의 RevPAR 회복 추이를 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Document NEWS Marriott International Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results • Fourth quarter 2025 RevPAR 1 increased 1.9 percent worldwide, with 6.1 percent growth in international markets and a 0.1 percent decline in U.S. & Canada. For full year 2025, RevPAR increased 2.0 percent worldwide, with 5.1 percent growth in international markets and 0.7 percent increase in U.S. & Canada • Fourth quarter reported diluted EPS totaled $1.65 and adjusted diluted EPS totaled $2.58. For the full year, reported diluted EPS total ed $9.51 and adjusted diluted EPS totale d $10.02 • Fourth quarter reported net income totaled $  Normalized numeric aliases: $445 million = 4억 4,500만 달러; $695 million = 6억 9,500만 달러; $2,601 million = 26억 100만 달러; $2,742 million = 27억 4,200만 달러; $1,402 million = 14억 200만 달러; $1.65 = 1.65달러; $2.58 = 2.58달러; $9.51 = 9.51달러; $445 = 445달러; $5 = 5달러; 6.1 percent = 6.1%; 1.9 percent = 1.9%; 0.1 percent = 0.1%; 2.0 percent = 2.0%; 5.1 percent = 5.1%; 0.7 percent = 0.7%.

383 million • With gross rooms additions of nearly 100,000 rooms globally during 2025, net rooms grew over 4.3 percent from year-end 2024 • At the end of the year, Marriott’s worldwide development pipeline reached a new record and totaled approximately 4,100 properties and nearly 610,000 rooms, with 43 percent of pipeline rooms under construction including rooms that are pending conversion • The company returned over $4.0 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases in 2025 • For full year 2026, we expect worldwide RevPAR to rise 1.5 to 2.5 percent, net rooms growth of 4.5 to 5 percent, adjusted EBITDA 2 growth of 8 to 10 percent and more than $4.3 billion of capital   Normalized numeric aliases: 383 million = 3억 8,300만 달러; $4.0 billion = 40억 달러; $4.3 billion = 43억 달러; $4.0 = 4.0달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; 100,000 million = 1,000억 달러; 4,100 million = 41억 달러; 610,000 million = 6,100억 달러; 43 percent = 43%; 4.3 percent = 4.3%; 2.5 percent = 2.5%; 5 percent = 5%; 10 percent = 10%.

justed EBITDA calculation. 1 BE THESDA, MD – February 10, 2026 - Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR) today reported fourth quarter and full year 2025 resul ts. Anthony Capuano, President and Chief Executive Officer, said, “Marriott delivered excellent results in 2025, reflecting the strength of our brands, delivery of great experiences to our customers and continued momentum in development activity. For the full year, net rooms grew over 4.3 percent, worldwide RevPAR increased 2 percent, and our fee‑driven, asset‑light business model continued to generate substantial cash, enabling over $4.0 billion of capital returns to shareholders. “In the fourth quarter, worldwide RevPAR rose 1.9 percent, driven by ADR gains. International RevPAR increased 6 percent, led by EMEA and APEC, benefiting from solid leisure transient and cross-border travel. generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
